scripts.start: [ -d node_modules ] || npm install && cargo tauri dev
scripts.help:
echo '
npm run start   - dev mode (hot-reload)
npm run build   - build distributable (DMG/MSI/AppImage)
npm run check   - type-check TS + Rust without building
npm run clean   - deep clean (node_modules, dist, target)

After clean:    npm install && npm run start
'
